argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const dryrun = {{ dryrun }} || false; const name = '{{ name }}'; return { dryrun, name }; }

argument.target: 自定义分组旁边的管理按钮

selectors.reason: Selects the button using its stable class names which describe its style and type, avoiding dynamic IDs.
Uses a parent container with a semi-stable class to scope the search for the button, reducing the chance of selecting other similar buttons if they exist elsewhere.

argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const name = intermediate.name; const dryrun = intermediate.dryrun; const allDivs = document.querySelectorAll('div'); let targetDiv = null; for (const div of allDivs) { const txt = (div.innerText || div.textContent || '').trim(); if (txt.includes(name) && txt.length < 50) { const closeBtn = div.querySelector('[class*="close"]') || div.querySelector('svg'); if (closeBtn) { targetDiv = div; break; } } } if (!targetDiv) return { error: 'Group not found: ' + name, name }; const closeBtn = targetDiv.querySelector('[class*="close"]') || targetDiv.querySelector('svg'); if (closeBtn) closeBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); if (dryrun) return [{ status: 'dryrun', message: 'Dryrun mode - delete clicked but not confirmed', name }]; const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"]'); for (const btn of buttons) { const t = (btn.innerText || btn.textContent || '').trim(); if (t === '确定') { btn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); return [{ status: 'success', message: 'Group deleted', name }]; } } return [{ status: 'success', message: 'Delete initiated', name }]; }
